q: Not a word *** all day long.
Little *** that she had done it.
Little *** that she had done it.

o: 1. Never I have said such a rude word.
2. Never have I said such a rude word.
1. Hardly I expected him to pass the exam.
2. Hardly did I expect him to pass the exam.
1. Only then did I realize that I was wrong.
2. Only then I realized that I was wrong.
1. Not a single word could he say.
2. Not a single word he could say.
1. Little did I dream that I should never see her again.
2. Little I dreamed that I should never see her again.
1. Little does he know how many problems he has caused.
2. Little he knows how many problems he has caused.
